Bash(docker compose exec -T radarr curl -s "http://localhost:7878/api/v3/qualityprofile" -H "X-Api-Key: 48cf4fe0d7c049e9942649e4e65a45e2" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
profiles = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for p in profiles:
    cfs = [f for f in p.get\('formatItems', []\) if f.get\('score', 0\) != 0]
    print\(f'ID={p[\\"id\\"]}: {p[\\"name\\"]} — {len\(cfs\)} scored CFs, cutoff={p.get\(\\"cutoff\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(docker compose exec -T radarr curl -s "http://localhost:7878/api/v3/qualityprofile" -H "X-Api-Key: 48cf4fe0d7c049e9942649e4e65a45e2" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\):
    cfs = [f for f in p.get\('formatItems', []\) if f.get\('score', 0\) > 0 or f.get\('score', 0\) < 0]
    print\(f'ID={p[\\"id\\"]}: {p[\\"name\\"]} \({len\(cfs\)} scored CFs\)'\)
")
